MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Anthony Risucci, Esq. 415-268-0554 Greg Ficks, Esq. 415-772-5779 Coblentz Patch Duffy & Bass LLP for Petitioner Plaintiff (in-person)
Robin Pearson, Esq. 925-954-1531 for Respondent.

PETITIONERS DAVID DALY, MARY DALY'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.
